goal: Declare the Tachikoma UI as a launchd user agent in default.nix so it auto-starts on login at localhost:4000

tasks.title: Add home.activation.buildTachikomaUI to default.nix
tasks.description: Add activation step that runs npm install + npm run build in mcps/tachikoma-ui/, non-fatal on failure.

tasks.title: Add home.activation.writeTachikomaUILauncher to default.nix
tasks.description: Add activation step that writes ~/.local/bin/tachikoma-ui-start: sources ~/.secrets, execs node --experimental-strip-types .../server/index.ts. chmod +x.

tasks.title: Declare launchd.user.agents.tachikoma-ui in default.nix
tasks.description: Add launchd user agent with ProgramArguments pointing to the launcher script, RunAtLoad=true, KeepAlive=true, log paths at /tmp/tachikoma-ui.log.

tasks.title: Verify nix eval --impure .#homeConfigurations exits without errors
tasks.description: Run: cd ~/projects/personal-nix && nix eval --impure .#homeConfigurations 2>&1 | head -40. Fix any nix syntax or attribute errors.

stop_condition: All 4 tasks done and nix eval exits cleanly
